title: Политика конфиденциальности
intro: At Codeverta & BikinWebsiteJogja, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our software development services.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect several types of information to provide and improve our services:
items: Identity Data: Name, company address, and official identity information for contract purposes.
Contact Data: Email address, WhatsApp/phone number, and delivery address.
Technical Data: IP address, browser type, location, and log data when accessing codeverta.com.
Project Data: Business documentation, company workflows, and digital assets you provide for system development.

usage.title: 2. Use of Information
usage.content: The information we collect is used to:
items: Provide website development, mobile app, and custom system services.
Provide technical support, maintenance, and system updates.
Send important information about service or policy changes.
Analyze site usage to improve user experience.

protection.title: 3. Security and Data Protection
protection.content: We apply industry security standards to protect your data. As a software house, we understand the importance of source code and databases:
items: Data Encryption: Sensitive data is transmitted through SSL/TLS technology.
Limited Access: Only developers assigned to your project can access code repositories and databases.
NDA: Our team is bound by confidentiality obligations not to disclose your business logic or project data.

third_party.title: 4. Sharing Data with Third Parties
third_party.content: We do not sell your data. However, we work with third-party providers to run certain functions:
items: Cloud hosting providers such as AWS, Google Cloud, or Cloudflare for system deployment.
Payment gateways to process invoices securely.
Analytics services such as Google Analytics to monitor site performance.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies Policy
cookies.content: Our site uses cookies to remember preferences such as language and recognize returning visitors. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, although some functions may not work optimally.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to request access to your personal data, request corrections to inaccurate data, or request deletion from our marketing systems after the project is completed, as long as it does not conflict with legal or tax obligations.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us by email at support@codeverta.com or through the contact details listed on codeverta.com.

seo.title: Codeverta - Политика конфиденциальности
seo.description: Learn how Codeverta collects, uses, protects personal data, uses cookies, and respects privacy rights for software and website service users.
seo.keywords: Codeverta privacy policy, data protection, cookies, personal data

notice.before: This document applies to all entities managed by
notice.after: By continuing to use our services, you are deemed to agree to the points above.
